results.why: This pass tightens [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] into a cleaner four-color shell by removing off-plan mana and an off-color card. [[Arena Rector]], [[Dovin's Veto]], [[Farewell]], and [[Oath of Nissa]] add efficient utility, interaction, and selection that fit a casual general-refinement goal. Trimming extra basics helps make room for higher-impact spells without changing the deck's overall pace.

results.why: This pass trims expensive, slower spells and replaces them with cheaper interaction, cantrips, proliferate pieces, and faster mana to better support [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]. Cutting [[Explosive Vegetation]] and [[Eyes in the Skies]] lowers reliance on clunkier effects and keeps the deck's token pressure more consistent.

raw.plan: These changes tighten [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] by improving evasive creature quality, adding cleaner interaction, and upgrading mana consistency. raw.why: These changes tighten [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] by improving evasive creature quality, adding cleaner interaction, and upgrading mana consistency. added.bident of thassa: [[Bident of Thassa]] turns Yuriko's evasive attacks into steady card draw.
added.clearwater pathway: [[Clearwater Pathway]] improves color access more efficiently than another basic land.
added.drowned catacomb: [[Drowned Catacomb]] is a low-cost dual land that helps smooth early turns.
added.prosperous thief: [[Prosperous Thief]] rewards repeated ninja connections with extra mana through Treasures.
added.reality shift: [[Reality Shift]] is efficient exile removal that answers problematic creatures cleanly.
added.thousand-faced shadow: [[Thousand-Faced Shadow]] is an evasive one-drop that supports early ninjutsu and later value.

removed.swamp: Extra [[Swamp]] copies were cut to make room for stronger dual lands and spells.
removed.cloud of faeries: [[Cloud of Faeries]] is a low-impact enabler here compared with stronger evasive options.
removed.consult the necrosages: [[Consult the Necrosages]] is clunky at three mana for the effect in this deck.
removed.dismember: [[Dismember]] was replaced by removal that answers more cleanly without the life cost pressure.
removed.signal pest: [[Signal Pest]] does not meaningfully support Yuriko's ninja-focused combat plan.

raw.why: This pass improves the [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] mana base by adding more flexible blue-black sources and a few simple ramp pieces. The changes aim to smooth early development, support both colors more reliably, and reduce lands that were less important for this casual build.

added.clearwater pathway: [[Clearwater Pathway]] is a flexible dual land that helps cast either color early.
added.coldsteel heart: [[Coldsteel Heart]] adds simple ramp while fixing for blue or black.
added.drowned catacomb: [[Drowned Catacomb]] improves two-color consistency with low opportunity cost.
added.island: [[Island]] increases reliable blue access for early setup and ninjutsu support.
added.shipwreck marsh: [[Shipwreck Marsh]] is another efficient dual land that supports both colors.

removed.reliquary tower: [[Reliquary Tower]] was less important than a land that better supports colored mana.
removed.rogue's passage: [[Rogue's Passage]] was cut because colorless utility mattered less than cleaner mana production.

results.why: This pass lowers the deck’s average mana value so [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] can deploy evasive attackers and ninjas earlier and more consistently. Cheap cantrips and one-drop unblockables improve early setup, while cleaner dual lands help smooth Dimir mana. The cuts remove clunky top-end, slower fillers, and excess basic lands that were raising the curve without supporting the tempo plan.

added.clearwater pathway: [[Clearwater Pathway]] is a flexible untapped source that improves early color access.
added.consider: [[Consider]] is a one-mana cantrip that smooths draws without slowing the deck down.
added.drowned catacomb: [[Drowned Catacomb]] adds efficient dual-color fixing for a faster start.
added.gingerbrute: [[Gingerbrute]] is a cheap evasive body that helps enable ninjutsu early.
added.island: [[Island]] supports a lower curve with a simple untapped blue source.
added.lim-dul's vault: [[Lim-Dul's Vault]] efficiently sets up future draws for stronger [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] turns.
added.mist-cloaked herald: [[Mist-Cloaked Herald]] is a one-drop unblockable attacker that reliably enables ninjutsu.
added.moon-circuit hacker: [[Moon-Circuit Hacker]] is a low-cost ninja that keeps cards flowing on combat damage.
added.morphic pool: [[Morphic Pool]] improves color consistency with an untapped dual land in Commander.
added.network disruptor: [[Network Disruptor]] is a cheap evasive artifact creature that supports early pressure and ninjutsu.
added.opt: [[Opt]] is a low-cost cantrip that helps keep draws efficient and the curve lean.
added.prosperous thief: [[Prosperous Thief]] adds a reasonably cheap ninja that also helps generate mana.
added.serum visions: [[Serum Visions]] is an efficient one-mana setup spell for smoother early turns.
added.shipwreck marsh: [[Shipwreck Marsh]] is a stronger dual land that supports early Dimir development.
added.temple of the false god: [[Temple of the False God]] was added as an extra mana source to support the trimmed mana base.
added.thousand-faced shadow: [[Thousand-Faced Shadow]] is a cheap evasive ninja that fits the lowered curve well.
added.triton shorestalker: [[Triton Shorestalker]] is another one-drop unblockable attacker that cleanly enables ninjutsu.

removed.swamp: Extra copies of [[Swamp]] were trimmed to make room for stronger fixing and lower-curve playables.
removed.aminatou's augury: [[Aminatou's Augury]] is too expensive for a curve-tightening [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] build.
removed.blinkmoth infusion: [[Blinkmoth Infusion]] is an extremely high-cost spell that does not fit the deck’s faster plan.
removed.cloud of faeries: [[Cloud of Faeries]] was cut to prioritize more reliable low-cost enablers and ninjas.
removed.consult the necrosages: [[Consult the Necrosages]] is a slower three-mana value spell that does not help the deck start quickly.
removed.dimir aqueduct: [[Dimir Aqueduct]] is slower than the replacement lands and can hinder early tempo.
removed.enter the infinite: [[Enter the Infinite]] is far too clunky for a casual curve-tightening pass.
removed.fabricate: [[Fabricate]] is a slower tutor that was cut for cheaper, more immediate cards.
removed.ink-eyes, servant of oni: [[Ink-Eyes, Servant of Oni]] sits high on the curve for this lower-cost ninja plan.
removed.jwar isle refuge: [[Jwar Isle Refuge]] entering tapped makes it a slower fixer than the new land options.
removed.ninja of the new moon: [[Ninja of the New Moon]] is an overcosted ninja compared with the cheaper replacements.
removed.signal pest: [[Signal Pest]] was cut because the deck prefers more reliable evasive ninjutsu enablers.
removed.silent-blade oni: [[Silent-Blade Oni]] is a very expensive payoff that works against the tighter curve goal.

raw.plan: This pass softens [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] by trimming high-impact extra-turn, tutor, and free-counterplay pieces while keeping the deck's evasive ninja game plan intact. Overall, the list becomes more casual by replacing sharp efficiency with slower, more table-friendly play patterns.
raw.why: This pass softens [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] by trimming high-impact extra-turn, tutor, and free-counterplay pieces while keeping the deck's evasive ninja game plan intact. added.access tunnel: [[Access Tunnel]] helps small attackers connect without adding a high-power effect.
added.bident of thassa: [[Bident of Thassa]] adds fair card draw tied to combat damage.

added.contaminated aquifer: [[Contaminated Aquifer]] is a slower dual land that supports casual mana development.
added.cover of darkness: [[Cover of Darkness]] supports ninja attacks by making the tribe harder to block.
added.drowned catacomb: [[Drowned Catacomb]] strengthens the mana base without raising deck explosiveness much.
added.go for the throat: [[Go for the Throat]] is simple, efficient removal that keeps interaction fair.
added.network disruptor: [[Network Disruptor]] is a low-cost evasive body that supports ninjutsu lines.
added.path of ancestry: [[Path of Ancestry]] adds tribal fixing with a modest upside.
added.prosperous thief: [[Prosperous Thief]] rewards ninja combat with steady value instead of big spikes.
added.reality shift: [[Reality Shift]] gives the deck clean removal in a more casual package.
added.reconnaissance mission: [[Reconnaissance Mission]] turns successful attacks into steady, combat-based card advantage.

removed.cyclonic rift: [[Cyclonic Rift]] is a famously strong reset that often overperforms in casual games.

removed.temporal mastery: [[Temporal Mastery]] was removed to avoid extra-turn gameplay in a casual pass.

added.moon-circuit hacker: [[Moon-Circuit Hacker]] adds another efficient ninja that keeps cards flowing.
added.morphic pool: [[Morphic Pool]] is a strong untapped dual land in Commander.
added.mystical dispute: [[Mystical Dispute]] is a cheap interactive spell that protects tempo efficiently.
added.polluted delta: [[Polluted Delta]] strengthens fixing by finding key blue or black sources.
added.prismatic vista: [[Prismatic Vista]] improves mana consistency by fetching the needed basic.
added.prosperous thief: [[Prosperous Thief]] adds a ninja body that also generates mana advantage.
added.river of tears: [[River of Tears]] provides efficient color access in a low-curve deck.
added.serum visions: [[Serum Visions]] improves draw quality and helps set up future turns.
added.shipwreck marsh: [[Shipwreck Marsh]] is a cleaner dual land than slower budget options.
added.submerge: [[Submerge]] is a strong tempo play that answers green creatures very efficiently.
added.takenuma, abandoned mire: [[Takenuma, Abandoned Mire]] adds flexible recursion with low deckbuilding cost.
added.thousand-faced shadow: [[Thousand-Faced Shadow]] is an evasive one-drop that fits the ninja plan well.

removed.island: An [[Island]] was cut because improved fixing reduces the need for as many basics.

removed.blinkmoth infusion: [[Blinkmoth Infusion]] is an off-plan high-cost spell that lacks efficiency here.
removed.cloud of faeries: [[Cloud of Faeries]] is lower impact than the new evasive enablers and ninja upgrades.
removed.consult the necrosages: [[Consult the Necrosages]] is a clunky value spell compared to cheaper card selection.
removed.dimir aqueduct: [[Dimir Aqueduct]] is slower and riskier than the upgraded dual lands.
removed.dismal backwater: [[Dismal Backwater]] entering tapped is a bigger cost than its minor life gain is worth.
removed.enter the infinite: [[Enter the Infinite]] is far too expensive for an optimized casual [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] list.
removed.fabricate: [[Fabricate]] is less necessary when the deck is focusing more on tempo and creature pressure.
removed.jwar isle refuge: [[Jwar Isle Refuge]] is another tapped land replaced by faster mana.
removed.moonblade shinobi: [[Moonblade Shinobi]] is a slower ninja that offers less efficient value than the new options.
removed.myriad landscape: [[Myriad Landscape]] is too slow for a two-color deck trying to curve out early.
removed.negate: [[Negate]] was replaced by interaction that is cheaper or more swingy in common scenarios.
removed.opal palace: [[Opal Palace]] does not fix mana as effectively as the upgraded dual lands.
removed.reliquary tower: [[Reliquary Tower]] is unnecessary when color consistency matters more than hand-size insurance.
removed.signal pest: [[Signal Pest]] is less reliable at enabling ninjutsu than true evasive one-drops.

added.blighted woodland: [[Blighted Woodland]] adds slower, fair ramp that fits a casual game pace.

added.golgari rot farm: [[Golgari Rot Farm]] improves color fixing in a slower, more casual mana base.
added.jungle hollow: [[Jungle Hollow]] is a budget dual land that smooths colors without raising power.
added.kindred summons: [[Kindred Summons]] is a splashy tribal payoff that suits creature-heavy casual games.
added.leaf-crowned visionary: [[Leaf-Crowned Visionary]] gives Elf tribal a fair anthem and steady card draw.

added.myriad landscape: [[Myriad Landscape]] provides slower ramp that is appropriate for a casual build.
added.pact of the serpent: [[Pact of the Serpent]] is a tribal draw spell that refills after committing to the board.

added.realmwalker: [[Realmwalker]] adds tribal card flow while keeping the deck focused on creatures.
added.rogue's passage: [[Rogue's Passage]] helps key attackers connect without relying on combo finishes.
added.skemfar shadowsage: [[Skemfar Shadowsage]] provides a flavorful Elf payoff that scales with your board.

added.tainted wood: [[Tainted Wood]] improves mana consistency on a reasonable budget.

removed.shared animosity: [[Shared Animosity]] sits outside [[Lathril, Blade of the Elves]]'s color identity.
